appconfig.environment.tags.CfnAbout: Metadata to assign to the environment. Tags help organize and categorize your AWS AppConfig resources. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value, both of which you define.

appconfig.environment.tags.Key.Description: The key-value string map. The valid character set is `[a-zA-Z+-=._:/]`. The tag key can be up to 128 characters and must not start with `aws:`.

appconfig.environment.tags.Value.Description: The tag value can be up to 256 characters.
